sum: For BGEETs that incorporate more campaigns, a single-class character can reach the level cap early and feel lonely in the face of teammates who level up later.
no: For BGEETs that incorporate more campaigns, a single-class character can reach the level cap early and feel lonely in the face of teammates who level up later.

co.n: XP exchange restricted to single-class characters only (Recommended)
Allow XP exchange for multi-class characters (Not recommended as it may disrupt game balance)
